hero.headline: Your Next-Gen Prayer Companion
hero.desc: Stay in sync with every prayer. Elegant design, precise times, and a powerful offline core, all crafted for focus and tranquility.

features.subtitle: Everything you need to track, orient, and prepare, with a premium feel.

clock.title: The Premium Clock Core
clock.subtitle: The Next Prayer Tracker
clock.desc: A precise core that keeps you ahead of every prayer with beautiful, glanceable widgets and gentle prompts.

list.title: Prayer Times List
list.subtitle: 100% Offline
list.desc: Accurate schedules with auto-detected methods and manual calculation options. No internet required.

qibla.title: Qibla Compass
qibla.subtitle: Live & Reliable
qibla.desc: Find the Qibla instantly using live compass readings and calibration guidance for accuracy.

adhan.title: Foreground Adhan
adhan.subtitle: Immersive Alerts
adhan.desc: Hear Adhan reminders even when focused on the app. Designed to be respectful and clear.

location.title: Global Location Search
location.subtitle: Auto-Detect & Manual
location.desc: Search any city worldwide or let Salati auto-detect your location to tailor times instantly.

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.subtitle: Offline First
privacy.desc: Core features work entirely offline so your data stays with you. Secure and dependable.

gallery.subtitle: Swipe to see the beautifully crafted interfaces of Salati.

dashboard.label: Prayer Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Your daily prayer hub at a glance

stats.subtitle: Built from the ground up to be the ultimate prayer companion.

focus.title: Built for Focus
focus.desc: Every detail is designed to keep distractions away and help you stay connected with your prayers throughout the day.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: No accounts, no tracking, no ads. Your data stays on your device and yours alone, the way it should be.

offline.title: Offline by Default
offline.desc: Core features work without internet. Prayer times are calculated locally so you're never left without guidance.

testimonial.quote: Salati has completely transformed how I track my prayers. The offline reliability and gorgeous widgets make it an essential part of my day.
testimonial.author: Omar A.

stats.mission: was created to bring tranquility and precision to your daily prayer routine, with no compromises on privacy, design, or reliability.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your prayer experience?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who have made Salati their daily companion. No ads, completely offline, beautifully designed.

footer.desc: The premium prayer companion designed for focus, tranquility, and offline reliability.
